metadata.name: Core Nexus TB Hybrid 1080p
metadata.description: A 1080p SDR hybrid build for TorBox users who also run a Usenet indexer. Combines TorBox's Usenet and torrent cache with NZBGeek for maximum source diversity. Unlike other builds, shows both cached and uncached streams — uncached streams are downloaded by TorBox before playback begins. Targets 1080p and 720p only — 4K and HDR are excluded. Blocks BluRay and Remux for low-end hardware compatibility. File range 1 GB–60 GB, 1080p capped at 25 GB. NZBGeek API key required — enter your key in the NZBGeek preset before saving. Tamtaro SEL stack with live-synced ESEs, PSEs, and regex.
metadata.author: Branding_Brevity

config.addonDescription: Low-End Hardware 1080p TorBox Hybrid. Cached + Uncached · SDR Only · BluRay/Remux Blocked · WEB-DL Priority · NZBGeek Usenet.

excludedStreamExpressions.expression: /*Bad 1080P Bluray*/(queryType=='movie') and count(quality(resolution(streams,'2160p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0 and (count(quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray REMUX'))==0) and count(rseMatched(resolution(quality(streams, 'Bluray'), '1080p'), 'DE Bluray T1', 'DE Bluray T2', 'DE Bluray T3', 'UHD Bluray T1', 'HD Bluray T1', 'UHD Bluray T2', 'HD Bluray T2', 'UHD Bluray T3', 'HD Bluray T3')) == 0 ? negate(merge(seadex(streams),library(streams)),quality(resolution(streams,'1080p'),'Bluray')):[]
/*ongoingSeasonPack*/((queryType=='series' or queryType=='anime.series') and ongoingSeason and (daysSinceLastAired <-1 or daysUntilNextEpisode>=0))?seasonPack(streams,'onlySeasons'):[]

/*Extra Cached (HQ)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEB-DL'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEB-DL'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'WEBRip'),'Unknown'), 6))

/*Extra Cached (LQ)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'HDTV','HDRip'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'TC','SCR'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'CAM','TS'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(negate(merge((library(streams)),uncached(streams)),streams),'Unknown'),'Unknown'), 6))

/*Extra Uncached (All)*/ merge( slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'576p','480p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray REMUX'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Bluray'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'HDTV','HDRip','DVDRip','HC HD-Rip'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'CAM','TS','TC','SCR'),'Unknown'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'2160p','1440p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'1080p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'720p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'576p','480p','360p'), 6), slice(resolution(quality(uncached(streams),'Unknown'),'Unknown'), 6))

/*Unknown Resolution*/ count(resolution(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), '2160p', '1440p', '1080p','720p','576p','480p')) > 5 ? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), resolution(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet', 'debrid'), 'Unknown')): []

/*Unknown Quality*/ count(quality(merge(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet'), cached(type(streams, 'debrid'))), 'Bluray REMUX','Bluray','WEB-DL','WEBRip','HDRip','HC HD-Rip','DVDRip','HDTV')) > 5 ? negate(merge(library(streams), seadex(streams)), quality(type(streams, 'p2p', 'http', 'usenet', 'stremio-usenet', 'debrid'), 'Unknown')): []

tamtaro.name: {service.cached::istrue["⚡ Iɴsᴛᴀɴᴛ • "||"⏳ Uɴᴄᴀᴄʜᴇᴅ • "]}{service.shortName::exists["{service.shortName}"||""]}🔹 {stream.resolution::exists["{stream.resolution::replace('2160p','🟣 4K UHD')::replace('1440p','🟡 2K')::replace('1080p','🔵 1080ᴘ')::replace('720p','🟢 720ᴘ')::replace('480p','⚫ 480ᴘ')}"||"⚪ Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]} • {stream.quality::exists["{stream.quality::replace('BluRay REMUX','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('BLURAY REMUX','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('Bluray Remux','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('BluRay Remux','💎 Rᴇᴍᴜx')::replace('BluRay','💿 BʟᴜRᴀʏ')::replace('BLURAY','💿 BʟᴜRᴀʏ')::replace('WEB-DL','🍿 Wᴇʙ-DL')::replace('Web-dl','🍿 Wᴇʙ-DL')::replace('WEBRip','📼 WᴇʙRɪᴘ')::replace('Webrip','📼 WᴇʙRɪᴘ')::smallcaps}"||"🔘 Sᴛᴀɴᴅᴀʀᴅ"]}{stream.audioTags::exists["🔹 {stream.audioTags::join(' • ')::replace('Atmos','🎶 Aᴛᴍᴏs')::replace('TrueHD','💎 TʀᴜᴇHD')::replace('DTS-HD MA','🔷 DTS-HD MA')::replace('DTS-X','🎵 DTS-X')::replace('DDP','🎶 DD+')::replace('DD+','🎶 DD+')::replace('DD','🎵 DD')::replace('AAC','🎵 ᴀᴀᴄ')::replace('FLAC','💿 ꜰʟᴀᴄ')::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.audioChannels::exists[" • 🔊 {stream.audioChannels::join('/')}"||""]}{stream.audioTags::~(?i)(EAC3|DDP|DD\+)["🔹 🔊 JBL Sᴘᴀᴛɪᴀʟ"||""]}{stream.visualTags::~(?i)(SDR|HDR10)["🔹 ☀️ Hɪᴍᴀʟᴀʏᴀ"||""]}{stream.releaseGroup::~(?i)(epsilon|framestor|qxr|tigole|ntb|flux|d-z0n3|playbd|hifi|don|huno|bmf)["🔹 👑 Pʀᴇᴍɪᴜᴍ"||""]}{stream.editions::exists["🔹 🎬 {stream.editions::join(' • ')::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.filename::~Boutique["🔹 🎬 ʙᴏᴜᴛɪQᴜᴇ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Despecialized["🔹 🌌 ᴅᴇꜱCPEᴄɪᴀʟɪᴢᴇᴅ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Final.Cut["🔹 ✂️ ꜰɪɴᴀʟ ᴄᴜᴛ"||""]}{stream.filename::~International["🔹 🌍 ɪɴᴛᴇʀɴᴀᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Matte["🔹 🌌 ᴏᴘᴇɴ ᴍᴀᴛᴛᴇ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Uncensored["🔹 🩸 ᴜɴᴄᴇɴꜱᴏʀᴇᴅ"||""]}{stream.filename::~Unrated["🔹 🎬 ᴜɴʀᴀᴛᴇᴅ"||""]}{stream.filename::~IMAX["🔹 🎞️ ɪᴍᴀx"||""]}{stream.filename::~Hybrid["🔹 🧬 ʜʏʙʀɪᴅ"||""]}
tamtaro.description: 🗓️ {stream.age::>0["{stream.age} Dᴀʏs"||"✨ Nᴇᴡ"]}{stream.type::exists["🔹 ☁️ {stream.type::smallcaps}"||""]}{addon.name::exists["🔹 🧩 {addon.name::smallcaps}"||""]}{tools.newLine}{stream.bitrate::exists["⚡ {stream.bitrate::sbitrate::replace('MBPS','ᴍʙᴘs')::replace('Mbps','ᴍʙᴘs')::replace('KBPS','ᴋʙᴘs')::replace('Kbps','ᴋʙᴘs')::smallcaps}"||"⚡ Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]}{stream.size::>0["🔹 💾 {stream.size::sbytes::smallcaps}"||"🔹 💾 Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]}{stream.seeders::>0["🔹 🌱 {stream.seeders} Sᴇᴇᴅᴇʀs"||""]}{tools.newLine}{tools.newLine}🎞️ Vɪᴅᴇᴏ: {stream.visualTags::exists["{stream.visualTags::join('🔹 ')::replace('HDR10+','✨ ʜᴅʀ¹⁰⁺')::replace('HDR10','🌟 ʜᴅʀ¹⁰')::replace('SDR','☀️ SDR')::replace('HDR','🌟 HDR')::replace('DV','✨ DV')::replace('10BIT','🎨 10ʙɪᴛ')::replace('10bit','🎨 10ʙɪᴛ')::replace('STANDARD','Sᴛᴀɴᴅᴀʀᴅ')::replace('Standard','Sᴛᴀɴᴅᴀʀᴅ')::smallcaps}"||"☀️ SDR"]}{stream.encode::exists["🔹 ⚙️ {stream.encode::replace('HEVC','ʜᴇᴠᴄ')::replace('AVC','ᴀᴠᴄ')::replace('AV1','ᴀᴠ1')::smallcaps}"||""]}🔹 🌍 Lᴀɴɢ: {stream.languages::>1["ᴇɴɢʟɪsʜ🔹 🗣️ ᴍᴜʟᴛɪ"||""]}{stream.languages::==1["{stream.languages::join('')::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.languages::exists[""||"Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ"]}{tools.newLine}🎯 Rᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇ: {stream.releaseGroup::exists["👑 {stream.releaseGroup::smallcaps}"||"👤 Uɴᴋɴᴏᴡɴ GʀᴏᴜG"]}{stream.regexMatched::exists["🔹 🛡️ {stream.regexMatched::smallcaps}"||""]}{stream.seadexBest::istrue["🔹 🏆 Bᴇsᴛ Rᴇʟᴇᴀsᴇ"||""]}
